overview: Hacker's Pendrive online store — a cybersecurity-themed e-commerce site selling a 32GB USB drive loaded with 125+ hacking tools for ₹3999, with UPI payment, order tracking, customer accounts, and a neon green admin dashboard.
features: Customer signup and login with email/password
Protected ordering — login required to place orders
Customer data stored in admin dashboard (name, email, hashed password, order history)
Auto screenshot of payment confirmation screen
Admin Customers section with full customer profiles
UPI payment with QR code and Pay Now button
Order tracking by order ID and email
